steps.title: Use the likely pattern
steps.content: The blank follows the adjective likely: respondents were more likely blank common Brazilian foods. Standard English uses an infinitive after likely to describe what someone is likely to do.

steps.title: Reject the wrong verb forms
steps.content: A is simple past, C is missing the required infinitive marker, and D is a past participle. The grammatical form after likely is the infinitive. The answer is B.
